name: Simon "Ghost" Riley

The omegas who were fortunate enough were taken home by the soldiers stationed in the area, but only if one of the alpha soldiers felt inclined to do so. If not, they could only hope for the best and pray that the gunfire didn’t come closer to what they reluctantly called home.
